lat_truth: # float64 — WGS84 decimal degrees — telemetry ground truth
lon_truth: # float64 — WGS84 decimal degrees — telemetry ground truth
alt_agl_m: # float32 — meters above ground level — EKF barometric/GNSS fusion
gnd_speed_ms: # float32 — meters per second — ground speed
sensor_lat: # float64 — WGS84 decimal degrees — sensor-reported target latitude
sensor_lon: # float64 — WGS84 decimal degrees — sensor-reported target longitude
detection_flag: # bool — True if sensor declared detection at this timestamp
range_m: # float32 — derived — slant range sensor-to-truth in meters
pos_error_m: # float32 — derived — horizontal geodesic error in meters
tier: # int8 — DCEF accuracy tier applied (1, 2, or 3)
rf_packet_loss_pct: # float32 — GCS telemetry packet loss percentage
site_id: # string — unique site identifier for federated linkage
